name: nox-mem-cross-pillar-tests
description: Wave G — Cross-pillar integration tests. 12 scenarios exercising combinations of P1+P2+P5+A1+A2+A3+L2+L3+L4 against real in-memory SQLite. Designed to catch the kind of bug only seam-level tests can surface (chained dependency, instance differences, timestamp drift, AAD-style mismatches).
